zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Norton於1352年出生在英國素福爾可哈迪斯莫時，她的父親Adam Norton19歲，母親Alice Nunwicke10歲。她於1368年與Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham在英國肯特霍爾斯特結婚。她去世於1411年在英國素福爾可貝汀菲兒享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Norton于1352年出生在英国素福爾可哈迪斯莫时，她的父亲Adam Norton19岁，母亲Alice Nunwicke10岁。她于1368年与Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham在英国肯特霍爾斯特结婚。她去世于1411年在英国素福爾可貝汀菲兒享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Norton was born in 1352, in Hartismere, Suffolk, England, her father, Adam Norton, was 19 and her mother, Alice Nunwicke, was 10. She married Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham in 1368, in Hawkhurst, Kent, England. She died in 1411, in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Norton est née en 1352, à Hartismere, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Adam Norton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice Nunwicke, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham en 1368, à Hawkhurst, Kent, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1411, à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Norton 1352 in Hartismere, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Norton 19 und ihre Mutter Alice Nunwicke 10. Sie hat 1368 in Hawkhurst, Kent, England Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham geheiratet. Sie starb 1411 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Norton è nata il nel 1352 nel Hartismere, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Adam Norton, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Alice Nunwicke, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham nel 1368, nel Hawkhurst, Kent, England. Morì nel 1411, nel Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Nortonが1352年にイギリススフォルクハーティスメアで生まれた時，父Adam Nortonは19歳，母Alice Nunwickeは10歳であった。1368年にイギリスケントハウクハルストでSir William Barrett Of Chipperhamと結婚した。彼女は1411年にイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Norton(이)가 1352년 영국 수폴크 하티스머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Norton(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Nunwicke(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 켄트 호k후르스트에서 Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1411년 영국 수폴크 베딩필드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베딩필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Norton nasceu em 1352, em Hartismere, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam Norton, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice Nunwicke, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham em 1368, em Hawkhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1411, em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Norton родилась в 1352 г. в местности хартисмир, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam Norton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Nunwicke, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham в 1368 г. в местности ховхурст, кэнт, Англия. Она умерла в 1411 г. в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Norton nació en 1352, en Hartismere, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam Norton, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alice Nunwicke, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham en 1368, en Hawkhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Murió en 1411, en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
